section.title: DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI Class Reference

listitem.para: class Utils
static TweenerCore< float, float, FloatOptions > DOFade (this CanvasGroup target, float endValue, float duration)
Tweens a CanvasGroup's alpha color to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Color, Color, ColorOptions > DOColor (this Graphic target, Color endValue, float duration)
Tweens an Graphic's color to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Color, Color, ColorOptions > DOFade (this Graphic target, float endValue, float duration)
Tweens an Graphic's alpha color to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Color, Color, ColorOptions > DOColor (this Image target, Color endValue, float duration)
Tweens an Image's color to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Color, Color, ColorOptions > DOFade (this Image target, float endValue, float duration)
Tweens an Image's alpha color to the given value.
static TweenerCore< float, float, FloatOptions > DOFillAmount (this Image target, float endValue, float duration)
Tweens an Image's fillAmount to the given value.
static Sequence DOGradientColor (this Image target, Gradient gradient, float duration)
Tweens an Image's colors using the given gradient (NOTE 1: only uses the colors of the gradient, not the alphas - NOTE 2: creates a Sequence, not a Tweener).
static TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DOFlexibleSize (this LayoutElement target, Vector2 endValue, float duration, bool snapping=false)
Tweens an LayoutElement's flexibleWidth/Height to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DOMinSize (this LayoutElement target, Vector2 endValue, float duration, bool snapping=false)
Tweens an LayoutElement's minWidth/Height to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DOPreferredSize (this LayoutElement target, Vector2 endValue, float duration, bool snapping=false)
Tweens an LayoutElement's preferredWidth/Height to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Color, Color, ColorOptions > DOColor (this Outline target, Color endValue, float duration)
Tweens a Outline's effectColor to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Color, Color, ColorOptions > DOFade (this Outline target, float endValue, float duration)
Tweens a Outline's effectColor alpha to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DOScale (this Outline target, Vector2 endValue, float duration)
Tweens a Outline's effectDistance to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DOAnchorPos (this RectTransform target, Vector2 endValue, float duration, bool snapping=false)
Tweens a RectTransform's anchoredPosition to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DOAnchorPosX (this RectTransform target, float endValue, float duration, bool snapping=false)
Tweens a RectTransform's anchoredPosition X to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DOAnchorPosY (this RectTransform target, float endValue, float duration, bool snapping=false)
Tweens a RectTransform's anchoredPosition Y to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Vector3, Vector3, VectorOptions > DOAnchorPos3D (this RectTransform target, Vector3 endValue, float duration, bool snapping=false)
Tweens a RectTransform's anchoredPosition3D to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Vector3, Vector3, VectorOptions > DOAnchorPos3DX (this RectTransform target, float endValue, float duration, bool snapping=false)
Tweens a RectTransform's anchoredPosition3D X to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Vector3, Vector3, VectorOptions > DOAnchorPos3DY (this RectTransform target, float endValue, float duration, bool snapping=false)
Tweens a RectTransform's anchoredPosition3D Y to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Vector3, Vector3, VectorOptions > DOAnchorPos3DZ (this RectTransform target, float endValue, float duration, bool snapping=false)
Tweens a RectTransform's anchoredPosition3D Z to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DOAnchorMax (this RectTransform target, Vector2 endValue, float duration, bool snapping=false)
Tweens a RectTransform's anchorMax to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DOAnchorMin (this RectTransform target, Vector2 endValue, float duration, bool snapping=false)
Tweens a RectTransform's anchorMin to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DOPivot (this RectTransform target, Vector2 endValue, float duration)
Tweens a RectTransform's pivot to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DOPivotX (this RectTransform target, float endValue, float duration)
Tweens a RectTransform's pivot X to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DOPivotY (this RectTransform target, float endValue, float duration)
Tweens a RectTransform's pivot Y to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DOSizeDelta (this RectTransform target, Vector2 endValue, float duration, bool snapping=false)
Tweens a RectTransform's sizeDelta to the given value.
static Tweener DOPunchAnchorPos (this RectTransform target, Vector2 punch, float duration, int vibrato=10, float elasticity=1, bool snapping=false)
Punches a RectTransform's anchoredPosition towards the given direction and then back to the starting one as if it was connected to the starting position via an elastic.

static Tweener DOShakeAnchorPos (this RectTransform target, float duration, float strength=100, int vibrato=10, float randomness=90, bool snapping=false, bool fadeOut=true, ShakeRandomnessMode randomnessMode=ShakeRandomnessMode.Full)
Shakes a RectTransform's anchoredPosition with the given values.

static Tweener DOShakeAnchorPos (this RectTransform target, float duration, Vector2 strength, int vibrato=10, float randomness=90, bool snapping=false, bool fadeOut=true, ShakeRandomnessMode randomnessMode=ShakeRandomnessMode.Full)
Shakes a RectTransform's anchoredPosition with the given values.
static Sequence DOJumpAnchorPos (this RectTransform target, Vector2 endValue, float jumpPower, int numJumps, float duration, bool snapping=false)
Tweens a RectTransform's anchoredPosition to the given value, while also applying a jump effect along the Y axis.
static Tweener DONormalizedPos (this ScrollRect target, Vector2 endValue, float duration, bool snapping=false)
Tweens a ScrollRect's horizontal/verticalNormalizedPosition to the given value.
static Tweener DOHorizontalNormalizedPos (this ScrollRect target, float endValue, float duration, bool snapping=false)
Tweens a ScrollRect's horizontalNormalizedPosition to the given value.
static Tweener DOVerticalNormalizedPos (this ScrollRect target, float endValue, float duration, bool snapping=false)
Tweens a ScrollRect's verticalNormalizedPosition to the given value.
static TweenerCore< float, float, FloatOptions > DOValue (this Slider target, float endValue, float duration, bool snapping=false)
Tweens a Slider's value to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Color, Color, ColorOptions > DOColor (this Text target, Color endValue, float duration)
Tweens a Text's color to the given value.
static TweenerCore< int, int, NoOptions > DOCounter (this Text target, int fromValue, int endValue, float duration, bool addThousandsSeparator=true, CultureInfo culture=null)
Tweens a Text's text from one integer to another, with options for thousands separators.
static TweenerCore< Color, Color, ColorOptions > DOFade (this Text target, float endValue, float duration)
Tweens a Text's alpha color to the given value.

static TweenerCore< string, string, StringOptions > DOText (this Text target, string endValue, float duration, bool richTextEnabled=true, ScrambleMode scrambleMode=ScrambleMode.None, string scrambleChars=null)
Tweens a Text's text to the given value.
static Tweener DOBlendableColor (this Graphic target, Color endValue, float duration)
Tweens a Graphic's color to the given value, in a way that allows other DOBlendableColor tweens to work together on the same target, instead than fight each other as multiple DOColor would do.
static Tweener DOBlendableColor (this Image target, Color endValue, float duration)
Tweens a Image's color to the given value, in a way that allows other DOBlendableColor tweens to work together on the same target, instead than fight each other as multiple DOColor would do.
static Tweener DOBlendableColor (this Text target, Color endValue, float duration)
Tweens a Text's color BY the given value, in a way that allows other DOBlendableColor tweens to work together on the same target, instead than fight each other as multiple DOColor would do.
static TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, CircleOptions > DOShapeCircle (this RectTransform target, Vector2 center, float endValueDegrees, float duration, bool relativeCenter=false, bool snapping=false)
Tweens a RectTransform's anchoredPosition so that it draws a circle around the given center.

section.section:
Member Function Documentation
DOAnchorMax() DOAnchorMaxDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOAnchorMax
TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOAnchorMax (this RectTransform target, Vector2 endValue, float duration, bool snapping = false )[static]
Tweens a RectTransform's anchorMax to the given value.
Also stores the RectTransform as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
snapping
If TRUE the tween will smoothly snap all values to integers
DOAnchorMin() DOAnchorMinDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOAnchorMin
TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOAnchorMin (this RectTransform target, Vector2 endValue, float duration, bool snapping = false )[static]
Tweens a RectTransform's anchorMin to the given value.
Also stores the RectTransform as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
snapping
If TRUE the tween will smoothly snap all values to integers
DOAnchorPos() DOAnchorPosDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOAnchorPos
TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOAnchorPos (this RectTransform target, Vector2 endValue, float duration, bool snapping = false )[static]
Tweens a RectTransform's anchoredPosition to the given value.
Also stores the RectTransform as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
snapping
If TRUE the tween will smoothly snap all values to integers

Also stores the RectTransform as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations

Tweens a RectTransform's anchoredPosition3D Z to the given value.
Also stores the RectTransform as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations

The end value to reach

DOAnchorPosX() DOAnchorPosXDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOAnchorPosX

Also stores the RectTransform as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations

DOAnchorPosY() DOAnchorPosYDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOAnchorPosY
TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOAnchorPosY (this RectTransform target, float endValue, float duration, bool snapping = false )[static]
Tweens a RectTransform's anchoredPosition Y to the given value.
Also stores the RectTransform as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
snapping
If TRUE the tween will smoothly snap all values to integers
DOBlendableColor()[1/3] DOBlendableColorDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOBlendableColor
Tweener DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOBlendableColor (this Graphic target, Color endValue, float duration)[static]
Tweens a Graphic's color to the given value, in a way that allows other DOBlendableColor tweens to work together on the same target, instead than fight each other as multiple DOColor would do.
Also stores the Graphic as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The value to tween to
duration
The duration of the tween
DOBlendableColor()[2/3] DOBlendableColorDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOBlendableColor
Tweener DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOBlendableColor (this Image target, Color endValue, float duration)[static]
Tweens a Image's color to the given value, in a way that allows other DOBlendableColor tweens to work together on the same target, instead than fight each other as multiple DOColor would do.
Also stores the Image as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The value to tween to
duration
The duration of the tween
DOBlendableColor()[3/3] DOBlendableColorDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOBlendableColor
Tweener DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOBlendableColor (this Text target, Color endValue, float duration)[static]
Tweens a Text's color BY the given value, in a way that allows other DOBlendableColor tweens to work together on the same target, instead than fight each other as multiple DOColor would do.
Also stores the Text as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The value to tween to
duration
The duration of the tween

TweenerCore< Color, Color, ColorOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOColor (this Graphic target, Color endValue, float duration)[static]
Tweens an Graphic's color to the given value.
Also stores the image as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
DOColor()[2/4] DOColorDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOColor
TweenerCore< Color, Color, ColorOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOColor (this Image target, Color endValue, float duration)[static]
Tweens an Image's color to the given value.
Also stores the image as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween

Tweens a Outline's effectColor to the given value.
Also stores the Outline as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters

The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
DOColor()[4/4] DOColorDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOColor
TweenerCore< Color, Color, ColorOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOColor (this Text target, Color endValue, float duration)[static]
Tweens a Text's color to the given value.
Also stores the Text as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
DOCounter() DOCounterDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOCounter
TweenerCore< int, int, NoOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOCounter (this Text target, int fromValue, int endValue, float duration, bool addThousandsSeparator = true , CultureInfo culture = null )[static]
Tweens a Text's text from one integer to another, with options for thousands separators.
Parameters
fromValue
The value to start from
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
addThousandsSeparator
If TRUE (default) also adds thousands separators
culture
The CultureInfo to use (InvariantCulture if NULL)
DOFade()[1/5] DOFadeDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOFade
TweenerCore< float, float, FloatOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOFade (this CanvasGroup target, float endValue, float duration)[static]
Tweens a CanvasGroup's alpha color to the given value.
Also stores the canvasGroup as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween

TweenerCore< Color, Color, ColorOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOFade (this Graphic target, float endValue, float duration)[static]
Tweens an Graphic's alpha color to the given value.
Also stores the image as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters

The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween

Also stores the image as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations

The end value to reach

Tweens a Outline's effectColor alpha to the given value.
Also stores the Outline as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters

The end value to reach

The duration of the tween
DOFade()[5/5] DOFadeDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOFade
TweenerCore< Color, Color, ColorOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOFade (this Text target, float endValue, float duration)[static]
Tweens a Text's alpha color to the given value.
Also stores the Text as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters

The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
DOFillAmount() DOFillAmountDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOFillAmount
TweenerCore< float, float, FloatOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOFillAmount (this Image target, float endValue, float duration)[static]
Tweens an Image's fillAmount to the given value.
Also stores the image as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach (0 to 1)
duration
The duration of the tween
DOFlexibleSize() DOFlexibleSizeDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOFlexibleSize
TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOFlexibleSize (this LayoutElement target, Vector2 endValue, float duration, bool snapping = false )[static]
Tweens an LayoutElement's flexibleWidth/Height to the given value.
Also stores the LayoutElement as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
snapping
If TRUE the tween will smoothly snap all values to integers
DOGradientColor() DOGradientColorDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOGradientColor
Sequence DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOGradientColor (this Image target, Gradient gradient, float duration)[static]
Tweens an Image's colors using the given gradient (NOTE 1: only uses the colors of the gradient, not the alphas - NOTE 2: creates a Sequence, not a Tweener).
Also stores the image as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
gradient
The gradient to use
duration
The duration of the tween
DOHorizontalNormalizedPos() DOHorizontalNormalizedPosDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOHorizontalNormalizedPos
Tweener DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOHorizontalNormalizedPos (this ScrollRect target, float endValue, float duration, bool snapping = false )[static]
Tweens a ScrollRect's horizontalNormalizedPosition to the given value.
Also stores the ScrollRect as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
snapping
If TRUE the tween will smoothly snap all values to integers
DOJumpAnchorPos() DOJumpAnchorPosDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOJumpAnchorPos
Sequence DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOJumpAnchorPos (this RectTransform target, Vector2 endValue, float jumpPower, int numJumps, float duration, bool snapping = false )[static]
Tweens a RectTransform's anchoredPosition to the given value, while also applying a jump effect along the Y axis.
Returns a Sequence instead of a Tweener. Also stores the RectTransform as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
jumpPower
Power of the jump (the max height of the jump is represented by this plus the final Y offset)
numJumps
Total number of jumps
duration
The duration of the tween
snapping
If TRUE the tween will smoothly snap all values to integers
DOMinSize() DOMinSizeDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOMinSize
TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOMinSize (this LayoutElement target, Vector2 endValue, float duration, bool snapping = false )[static]
Tweens an LayoutElement's minWidth/Height to the given value.
Also stores the LayoutElement as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
snapping
If TRUE the tween will smoothly snap all values to integers
DONormalizedPos() DONormalizedPosDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDONormalizedPos
Tweener DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DONormalizedPos (this ScrollRect target, Vector2 endValue, float duration, bool snapping = false )[static]
Tweens a ScrollRect's horizontal/verticalNormalizedPosition to the given value.
Also stores the ScrollRect as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
snapping
If TRUE the tween will smoothly snap all values to integers
DOPivot() DOPivotDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOPivot
TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOPivot (this RectTransform target, Vector2 endValue, float duration)[static]
Tweens a RectTransform's pivot to the given value.
Also stores the RectTransform as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
DOPivotX() DOPivotXDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOPivotX
TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOPivotX (this RectTransform target, float endValue, float duration)[static]
Tweens a RectTransform's pivot X to the given value.
Also stores the RectTransform as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
DOPivotY() DOPivotYDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOPivotY
TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOPivotY (this RectTransform target, float endValue, float duration)[static]
Tweens a RectTransform's pivot Y to the given value.
Also stores the RectTransform as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
DOPreferredSize() DOPreferredSizeDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOPreferredSize
TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOPreferredSize (this LayoutElement target, Vector2 endValue, float duration, bool snapping = false )[static]
Tweens an LayoutElement's preferredWidth/Height to the given value.
Also stores the LayoutElement as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
snapping
If TRUE the tween will smoothly snap all values to integers
DOPunchAnchorPos() DOPunchAnchorPosDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOPunchAnchorPos
Tweener DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOPunchAnchorPos (this RectTransform target, Vector2 punch, float duration, int vibrato = 10 , float elasticity = 1 , bool snapping = false )[static]
Punches a RectTransform's anchoredPosition towards the given direction and then back to the starting one as if it was connected to the starting position via an elastic.
Also stores the RectTransform as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
punch
The direction and strength of the punch (added to the RectTransform's current position)
duration
The duration of the tween
vibrato
Indicates how much will the punch vibrate
elasticity
Represents how much (0 to 1) the vector will go beyond the starting position when bouncing backwards. 1 creates a full oscillation between the punch direction and the opposite direction, while 0 oscillates only between the punch and the start position
snapping
If TRUE the tween will smoothly snap all values to integers
DOScale() DOScaleDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOScale
TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOScale (this Outline target, Vector2 endValue, float duration)[static]
Tweens a Outline's effectDistance to the given value.
Also stores the Outline as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
DOShakeAnchorPos()[1/2] DOShakeAnchorPosDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOShakeAnchorPos
Tweener DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOShakeAnchorPos (this RectTransform target, float duration, float strength = 100 , int vibrato = 10 , float randomness = 90 , bool snapping = false , bool fadeOut = true , ShakeRandomnessMode randomnessMode = ShakeRandomnessMode::Full )[static]
Shakes a RectTransform's anchoredPosition with the given values.
Also stores the RectTransform as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
duration
The duration of the tween
strength
The shake strength
vibrato
Indicates how much will the shake vibrate
randomness
Indicates how much the shake will be random (0 to 180 - values higher than 90 kind of suck, so beware). Setting it to 0 will shake along a single direction.
snapping
If TRUE the tween will smoothly snap all values to integers
fadeOut
If TRUE the shake will automatically fadeOut smoothly within the tween's duration, otherwise it will not
randomnessMode
Randomness mode
DOShakeAnchorPos()[2/2] DOShakeAnchorPosDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOShakeAnchorPos
Tweener DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOShakeAnchorPos (this RectTransform target, float duration, Vector2 strength, int vibrato = 10 , float randomness = 90 , bool snapping = false , bool fadeOut = true , ShakeRandomnessMode randomnessMode = ShakeRandomnessMode::Full )[static]
Shakes a RectTransform's anchoredPosition with the given values.
Also stores the RectTransform as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
duration
The duration of the tween
strength
The shake strength on each axis
vibrato
Indicates how much will the shake vibrate
randomness
Indicates how much the shake will be random (0 to 180 - values higher than 90 kind of suck, so beware). Setting it to 0 will shake along a single direction.
snapping
If TRUE the tween will smoothly snap all values to integers
fadeOut
If TRUE the shake will automatically fadeOut smoothly within the tween's duration, otherwise it will not
randomnessMode
Randomness mode
DOShapeCircle() DOShapeCircleDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOShapeCircle
TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, CircleOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOShapeCircle (this RectTransform target, Vector2 center, float endValueDegrees, float duration, bool relativeCenter = false , bool snapping = false )[static]
Tweens a RectTransform's anchoredPosition so that it draws a circle around the given center.
Also stores the RectTransform as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations.
IMPORTANT: SetFrom(value) requires a Vector2 instead of a float, where the X property represents the "from degrees value"
Parameters
center
Circle-center/pivot around which to rotate (in UI anchoredPosition coordinates)
endValueDegrees
The end value degrees to reach (to rotate counter-clockwise pass a negative value)
duration
The duration of the tween
relativeCenter
If TRUE the center coordinates will be considered as relative to the target's current anchoredPosition
snapping
If TRUE the tween will smoothly snap all values to integers
DOSizeDelta() DOSizeDeltaDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOSizeDelta
TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOSizeDelta (this RectTransform target, Vector2 endValue, float duration, bool snapping = false )[static]
Tweens a RectTransform's sizeDelta to the given value.
Also stores the RectTransform as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
snapping
If TRUE the tween will smoothly snap all values to integers
DOText() DOTextDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOText
TweenerCore< string, string, StringOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOText (this Text target, string endValue, float duration, bool richTextEnabled = true , ScrambleMode scrambleMode = ScrambleMode::None , string scrambleChars = null )[static]
Tweens a Text's text to the given value.
Also stores the Text as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end string to tween to
duration
The duration of the tween
richTextEnabled
If TRUE (default), rich text will be interpreted correctly while animated, otherwise all tags will be considered as normal text
scrambleMode
The type of scramble mode to use, if any
scrambleChars
A string containing the characters to use for scrambling. Use as many characters as possible (minimum 10) because DOTween uses a fast scramble mode which gives better results with more characters. Leave it to NULL (default) to use default ones
DOValue() DOValueDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOValue
TweenerCore< float, float, FloatOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOValue (this Slider target, float endValue, float duration, bool snapping = false )[static]
Tweens a Slider's value to the given value.
Also stores the Slider as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
snapping
If TRUE the tween will smoothly snap all values to integers
DOVerticalNormalizedPos() DOVerticalNormalizedPosDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUIDOVerticalNormalizedPos
Tweener DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.DOVerticalNormalizedPos (this ScrollRect target, float endValue, float duration, bool snapping = false )[static]
Tweens a ScrollRect's verticalNormalizedPosition to the given value.
Also stores the ScrollRect as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations

The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
snapping
If TRUE the tween will smoothly snap all values to integers
